name: Large 125oz Glass & Wood Storage Canister - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Airtight Seal, Hand Washable, Kitchen Essential
description:
Store your favorite munchies, snacks, spices and more in style in this Glass & Wood Storage Canister from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Made from glass, this storage canister features an air-tight wooden lid to ensure the contents stay fresh, while its transparent design lets you look inside without having to open the lid. Featuring a classic, cylindrical silhouette with a natural-finish wood lid, this glass storage jar adds sleek style to your pantry, kitchen counters or shelves.

Celebrate the everyday with Hearth & Hand — created exclusively for Target in collaboration with Magnolia, a home and lifestyle brand by Chip & Joanna Gaines. Built upon our shared commitment to giving back to our communities, these pieces reveal the beauty of everyday moments shared with family and friends.
